title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Helming the Ship

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin has the time of her life racing against
her rival at the Takarazuka Kinen. Relishing the
feel of the breeze, all she wants to do is run some
more—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That is, until she sees Mejiro Ryan expressing her
gratitude to the crowd. Scrambling to thank her
own fans too, Ines promises to keep working hard
to live up to their expectations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me that she hopes to make her next race
another that will make her supporters happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt in my mind that what her fans
really want is to see her having a great time on
the track, and the autumn Tenno Sho is a race
she'll definitely enjoy!
